spirit:component.spirit:name: pci64_0
spirit:component.spirit:description: The LogiCORE 64-bit Initiator/Target v4 for PCI is based on the PCI 64-bit version 3 core and has been optimized for the 7-Series architecture. With the Xilinx LogiCORE 64-bit Initiator/Target for PCI, a designer can build a customized PCI 3.0 compliant design with performance approaching 533 Mbytes/sec. PCI is a popular bus standard, not only for personal computers, but also for industrial computers, communication switches, routers and instrumentation.
